title: Trade Execution, Risk Management, and Portfolio Management
objective: Execute paper/live trades from recommendations, apply real-time risk controls, and maintain portfolio state with lifecycle monitoring.
prd_mapping: Section 7: Trade Execution Engine, Risk Management Service, Portfolio Management Service
scope: Execution flow for paper and live modes.
Active trade monitor and exit policy enforcement.
deliverables: Execution service with broker integration adapter.
Risk policies: max loss, max exposure, strategy-level caps.
Trade lifecycle state machine with audit trail.
Portfolio summary APIs and user position views.
success_metrics: Trade execution path under 300 ms internal latency target.
Risk rejections logged with deterministic reason codes.
risks: Order rejection mismatch between simulation and live broker.
open_questions: How should partial fills affect target/SL sizing?
Should strategy auto-retry on transient broker failures?
